expectedBehavior: Run the chatbot agent as a Spring Boot @AcpAgent that calls Claude through Spring AI's ChatClient (provider autoconfigured from spring-ai-starter-model-anthropic, built on the community acp-spring-boot-starter). The demo launches the Spring Boot agent as a subprocess and asks what Spring AI's ChatClient does; the agent should return a genuine, non-echoed AI-generated answer and end with stop reason END_TURN.
requiredOutput: === Module 26: Spring AI Chatbot Agent Demo ===
Connected to Spring AI ChatbotAgent (powered by Claude)!
You: In one sentence, what does Spring AI's ChatClient do?
